sqlMap.select: SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #deptID#

SELECT cn , cn deptid , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm displayname displayname1 , displayname2 , mail , extensionattribute1 , extensionattribute2 , extensionattribute3 , extensionattribute4 , extensionattribute5 , extensionattribute6 , extensionattribute7 , extensionattribute8 , extensionattribute9 , extensionattribute10 , extensionattribute11 , extensionattribute12 , extensionattribute13 , extensionattribute14 , extensionattribute15 , adspath , updatedt , 'dept' type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #userID#
